languages.text: "Напрасная трата слов и угроз. Ты умрешь, исчадие Архиврага".

traits.locale_text: Как бы то ни было, мы тебя убьем
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Напрасная трата слов и угроз. Ты умрешь, исчадие Архиврага".
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "A waste of words and hollow threats. You will die, thrall to the Archenemy."
languages.original_text: "Напрасная трата слов и угроз. Ты умрешь, исчадие Архиврага".

traits.locale_text: "An complete waste of words and hollow threats. You will die, thrall to the Archenemy."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "A waste of words and hollow threats. You will die, thrall to the Archenemy."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "Eine Verschwendung von Worten und leeren Drohungen. Du wirst sterben, als Sklave des Erzfeindes."
languages.original_text: "A waste of words and hollow threats. You will die, thrall to the Archenemy."

traits.locale_text: "Eine Verschwendung von Worten und leeren Drohungen. Du wirst sterben, als Sklave des Erzfeindes."

languages.text: "Un gaspillage de mots et de menaces creuses. Tu mourras, esclave de l'ennemi juré."
languages.original_text: "A waste of words and hollow threats. You will die, thrall to the Archenemy."

traits.locale_text: "Un gaspillage de mots et de menaces creuses. Tu mourras, esclave de l'ennemi juré."

languages.text: "Un desperdicio de palabras y amenazas huecas. Morirás, esclava del Archienemigo".
languages.original_text: "A waste of words and hollow threats. You will die, thrall to the Archenemy."

traits.locale_text: "Un desperdicio de palabras y amenazas huecas. Morirás, esclava del Archienemigo".

languages.text: "Boş laflar ve içi boş tehditler. Baş Düşman'ın kölesi olarak öleceksin."
languages.original_text: "A waste of words and hollow threats. You will die, thrall to the Archenemy."

traits.locale_text: "Boş laflar ve içi boş tehditler. Baş Düşman'ın kölesi olarak öleceksin."
